name: Morning Long Run
description:
‍Felt pretty good about that one - finally kept up with Lauren Sopp and Alex and got a 20min and 1hr power PB since I started back up running 🏃 

Pretty scared about next weeks 9miler and the Half in 7 weeks is supposed to be 1min/mile faster 😬 we will see how that goes!

👍 1.74 new miles

-- From Wandrer

_note: STRAVA activities are not available via the API

name: Intervals Run
description:
Made the Hard fairly hard and the easy fairly easy 👍🏻

I think I could go easier on the easy (even if a run/walk) and make the hard harder - improvement for next time

name: Morning Run
description:
Solid Run with Clayton and Lauren, foot started barely going numb around 4ish miles - but was not really all that numb until after 6 miles. 

Did some mild dynamic and static stretching prior to the run. Also had good step count all this week which I also think probably helped out.

Felt pretty decent on the run today - definitely tired near the end, especially hip flexors and Heart, but all in all I was impressed by my run.

_note: STRAVA activities are not available via the API

name: Intervals Run
description:
Felt much better today - intervals were hard but doable.

Foot went numb later than normal too which is nice

name: Afternoon Solo Run
description:
Listening to an interview with Alisa Vitti on today’s run - really great stuff as always!

name: Morning Run with Friends
description: Watched them run off into the distance as I did my own pace 😅
